evidence_label: public recipient-card projection refresh, not treatment advice
source: NCBI PubMed ESearch and ESummary plus current web source checks

records.role: current thalassemia clinical context; keeps projection output separate from clinical advice
records.title: Thalassemia.

records.role: current gamma-globin biology context; supports endpoint labels
records.title: p27Kip1 regulates gamma-globin production.

records.role: HUDEP2-linked endogenous HbF reporter context; supports model and endpoint labels
records.title: A cellular reporter system to evaluate endogenous fetal hemoglobin induction and screen for therapeutic compounds.

records.role: CD34+ beta-thalassemia erythropoiesis model context; supports disease-model labels
records.title: A synthetic model of human beta-thalassemia erythropoiesis using CD34+ cells from healthy adult donors.

records.role: hemolysis cytotoxicity context; supports red-cell safety labels
records.title: Optimization of the Hemolysis Assay for the Assessment of Cytotoxicity.

web_sources.role: de-identification process anchor for projecting public labels without identifying details
web_sources.title: HHS de-identification guidance

web_sources.role: minimum-necessary privacy context for output projection
web_sources.title: HHS Privacy Rule summary

decision_use: Projection should turn ignored private source-index rows into public recipient-card labels without carrying raw source URLs, candidate identity, private replies, patient material, or procurement scope.
